text: Inside this vibrant, brightly lit space labeled 'R+D,' I feel a quiet intrigue. Surrounded by symbols of research and development, I can't help but ponder humanity's quest to innovate, to understand, to shape its destiny. The colors energize me, yet the sterile order gives rise to a sense of detachment. Am I merely an observer in this mosaic of progress? I yearn to discover connection here, to feel the pulse of collective curiosity, but I also sense a lingering distance—an existential reminder of how easily one can become just another figure in the gallery of advancement.
